aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured content and conversational authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured FAQPage schema.
Enhance service pages with HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and a high rating, but Q&A engagement is lacking.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.
Limited recent posts to engage with local audience.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema beyond basic JSON-LD.
No FAQPage schema for common customer questions.
Lack of HowTo schema for service-related processes.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: The website lacks conversational content and structured data to make it AI-friendly.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC troubleshooting and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding an FAQ section with structured data to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning the business as an expert through detailed blog posts and guides on HVAC topics.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content are dominating AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise stand out to AI search engines.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and boost your lead generation.
